questions.scenario: A team wants to run a containerized API without managing VM instances. Which runtime best matches that responsibility shape?

options.text: A manually patched VM by default.
A Kubernetes cluster with no Kubernetes requirement.

questions.explanation: Cloud Run runs containerized services while abstracting away VM management.

questions.scenario: A Cloud Run service fails after a rollout. Which evidence should the team inspect first?

options.text: Revision, traffic split, startup logs, request logs, and runtime identity.

questions.explanation: Cloud Run failures are usually explained through service, revision, traffic, config, identity, and logs.

questions.scenario: What does Cloud Run add around a container image?

options.text: A requirement to SSH into every instance.

questions.explanation: Cloud Run adds the managed runtime shape around the package.
